baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: AGMH exhibits extreme valuation compression (PE=0.109, PB=0.019, EV/EBITDA=0.371) and severe price deterioration (-79.7% 5d, -87.9% 20d, -94.0% 60d). Macro regime is Overheat/Moderately Restrictive, mandating strict quality discipline. Recent financing catalyst (2025-03-03/05 $5.4M offering) is corroborated by polygon_news but lacks primary-source confirmation and sentiment/ownership verification. Wikipedia pageviews show modest attention (307-460 views/day, no spike). Information integrity assessment flags low-tier-only sources with no T1/T2 corroboration. Alternative-data adapters largely failed (github unmapped, fmp_sentiment empty, sec_13f unavailable). Fundamental snapshot (Q3 2024) shows profitability but is 5+ months stale. Insufficient evidence to confirm either surge-short or quality-long thesis; macro discipline + missing corroboration + low information integrity + unverified catalyst narrative mandate fail-closed posture.
suggested_improvements: Obtain SEC 8-K filing confirmation for financing event to verify official disclosure
Reconnect fmp_sentiment and sec_13f adapters to assess analyst grades and institutional positioning
Resolve github_public mapping to evaluate tech/development activity if applicable
Await Agent-03 narrative_price_gap_assessment to quantify catalyst-price alignment
Collect insider Form 4 activity post-decision to assess management confidence
Monitor macro regime transition; if equity_discipline relaxes, re-evaluate quality_long candidacy

Monitor Q4 2024 or Q1 2025 earnings release for updated fundamentals

baseline_solo.reason: Macro regime (Overheat/Moderately Restrictive) mandates strict quality discipline; information integrity assessment flags low-tier-only sources with no primary-source corroboration; alternative-data adapters failed (github unmapped, fmp_sentiment empty, sec_13f unavailable); sentiment/ownership evidence not evaluated; catalyst narrative (financing) unverified by SEC filing. Extreme valuation compression and severe price drawdown suggest distress, but insufficient corroboration prevents confident surge-short thesis. Fail-closed per missing-evidence protocol.

Price drawdown (-79.7% 5d, -87.9% 20d, -94.0% 60d) is severe but lacks catalyst confirmation; may reflect broader market stress or company-specific deterioration

No recent Form 4 insider activity (90d lookback); no 8-K filing in 90d window limits catalyst verification
Macro regime stress_score=2 (yield curve inverted, policy rate elevated); equity allocation capped at 20%; quality_long discipline applies

rule_engine_path: 2. Candidate type evaluation: surge_short candidate requires high-confidence catalyst + corroboration
3. Catalyst assessment: financing event (2025-03-03/05 $5.4M offering) corroborated by polygon_news but unverified by SEC 8-K
4. Information integrity check: low-tier-only sources (T1=0, T2=0); use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false
5. Alternative-data corroboration: github_public unmapped, fmp_sentiment empty, sec_13f unavailable → insufficient external verification
6. Sentiment/ownership evidence: not_evaluated; no institutional positioning or insider activity data
7. Valuation analysis: extreme compression (PE=0.109, PB=0.019, EV/EBITDA=0.371) suggests distress but TTM ratios not PIT-safe
8. Price action: severe drawdown (-79.7% 5d, -87.9% 20d, -94.0% 60d) lacks catalyst confirmation
9. Fundamental staleness: Q3 2024 data is 5+ months old; no recent earnings to confirm trajectory
decision_log: T+0: Read macro_regime block → Overheat/Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2); equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution
T+1: Evaluate candidate_type=surge_short → requires high-confidence catalyst + corroboration under restrictive macro
T+2: Assess catalyst (financing event 2025-03-03/05) → corroborated by polygon_news (2 items) but unverified by SEC 8-K filing
T+3: Check information_integrity_assessment → low-tier-only sources (T3=1, T4=1); use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false
T+4: Evaluate alternative_data_features → github_public unmapped (error), fmp_sentiment all_endpoints_empty, sec_13f not_available_on_current_plan
T+5: Check sentiment_community_ownership_evidence → status=not_evaluated; no fmp_sentiment, sec_13f, or community metrics
T+6: Analyze valuation_snapshot → extreme compression (PE=0.109, PB=0.019, EV/EBITDA=0.371) but TTM ratios not PIT-safe
T+7: Review price_snapshot → severe drawdown (-79.7% 5d, -87.9% 20d, -94.0% 60d) but lacks catalyst confirmation
T+8: Assess fundamental_snapshot → Q3 2024 profitability (net_margin=63.93%) but 5+ months stale
T+9: Evaluate veto conditions → insufficient_evidence=true, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true, information_integrity_veto=true
T+10: Collapse decision → fail-closed to no_trade; position_size_pct=0.0; immutable_decision_flag=true
